languages.text: {n}Лицо мужчины кривится в подобии блаженной экзальтации.{/n} "Молитва... не слова! Молитва... деяния п-п-праведных! Бог-Император... Я... Н-не узрел... замысел и стенал! Я вижу! Мои сандалии стерты, но я иду..."

{n}The man's face twists into a semblance of zealous frenzy.{/n} "Prayer... not words! Prayer... deeds of the rrrighteous! God-Emperor... I... f-failed to see Your plan, so I wailed! Now I behold! My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk..."
languages.original_text: {n}Лицо мужчины кривится в подобии блаженной экзальтации.{/n} "Молитва... не слова! Молитва... деяния п-п-праведных! Бог-Император... Я... Н-не узрел... замысел и стенал! Я вижу! Мои сандалии стерты, но я иду..."

{n}The man's face twists into a semblance of zealous frenzy.{/n} "Prayer... not words! Prayer... deeds of the rrrighteous! God-Emperor... I... f-failed to see Your plan, so I wailed! Now I behold! My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk..."

{n}The man's face twists into a semblance of zealous frenzy.{/n} "Prayer... not words! Prayer... deeds of the rrrighteous! God-Emperor... I... f-failed to see Your plan, so I wailed! Now I behold! My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk..."

{n}The man's face twists into a semblance of zealous frenzy.{/n} "Prayer... not words! Prayer... deeds of the rrrighteous! God-Emperor... I... f-failed to see Your plan, so I wailed! Now I behold! My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk..."

languages.text: {n}狂信的な炎が男の目に燃え上がる。{/n}「私は盲目だった！神皇帝は私に試練を与え、別の体で生まれ変わりを許し、彼の計画を見逃し、運命を嘆いた！しかし今、私は…私の道が見える！」
languages.original_text: {n}A fanatical fire lights in the man's eyes.{/n} "I am blind! The God-Emperor sent me a test of will, granted me rebirth in a different body, and I failed to see his plan and lamented my fate! But now I see... I see my path!"

traits.locale_text: 狂信的な炎が男の目に燃え上がる。「私は盲目だった！神皇帝は私に試練を与え、別の体で生まれ変わりを許し、彼の計画を見逃し、運命を嘆いた！しかし今、私は…私の道が見える！」

languages.text: {n}男人的脸扭曲成一副狂热的模样。{/n}“祷告……不是言语，祷告是正义者……的行动！神皇……我……未能理解您的计划，所以我哭喊！现在我看见了！我的凉鞋早已磨烂，可我依然在前行……”
languages.original_text: {n}The man's face twists into a semblance of zealous frenzy.{/n} "Prayer... not words! Prayer... deeds of the rrrighteous! God-Emperor... I... f-failed to see Your plan, so I wailed! Now I behold! My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk..."

traits.locale_text: {n}男人的脸扭曲成一副狂热的模样。{/n}“祷告……不是言语，祷告是正义者……的行动！神皇……我……未能理解您的计划，所以我哭喊！现在我看见了！我的凉鞋早已磨烂，可我依然在前行……”

languages.text: {n}Le visage de l'homme se distord dans une expression de zèle fanatique.{/n} « Les prières... Pas des mots ! Les prières... Les actes des vertueux ! Empereur-Dieu... J-Je ne voyais pas votre plan, alors je pleurais ! Mais la vérité m'est apparue ! Mes sandales sont en lambeaux, mais je continue à marcher... »
languages.original_text: {n}The man's face twists into a semblance of zealous frenzy.{/n} "Prayer... not words! Prayer... deeds of the rrrighteous! God-Emperor... I... f-failed to see Your plan, so I wailed! Now I behold! My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage de l'homme se distord dans une expression de zèle fanatique.{/n} « Les prières... Pas des mots ! Les prières... Les actes des vertueux ! Empereur-Dieu... J-Je ne voyais pas votre plan, alors je pleurais ! Mais la vérité m'est apparue ! Mes sandales sont en lambeaux, mais je continue à marcher... »

languages.text: {n}La cara del hombre se retuerce, formando una mueca de fervor religioso.{/n} «Oración... ¡no palabras! Oración... ¡actos de los justooos! Dios Emperador... no... pude ver Tu plan, ¡y gemí! ¡Ahora veo! Mis sandalias están hechas jirones, pero sigo caminando...».
languages.original_text: {n}The man's face twists into a semblance of zealous frenzy.{/n} "Prayer... not words! Prayer... deeds of the rrrighteous! God-Emperor... I... f-failed to see Your plan, so I wailed! Now I behold! My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk..."

traits.locale_text: {n}La cara del hombre se retuerce, formando una mueca de fervor religioso.{/n} «Oración... ¡no palabras! Oración... ¡actos de los justooos! Dios Emperador... no... pude ver Tu plan, ¡y gemí! ¡Ahora veo! Mis sandalias están hechas jirones, pero sigo caminando...».

languages.text: {n}Adamın yüzü, fanatikçe bir çılgınlığa bürünüyor.{/n} "Dua... Sözler değildir! Dua... Haklıların eylemleridir! Tanrı İmparator... Ben... Planını göremedim, feryat ettim! Şimdi görüyorum! Çarıklarım paramparça oldu ama hâlâ yürüyorum..."
languages.original_text: {n}The man's face twists into a semblance of zealous frenzy.{/n} "Prayer... not words! Prayer... deeds of the rrrighteous! God-Emperor... I... f-failed to see Your plan, so I wailed! Now I behold! My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Adamın yüzü, fanatikçe bir çılgınlığa bürünüyor.{/n} "Dua... Sözler değildir! Dua... Haklıların eylemleridir! Tanrı İmparator... Ben... Planını göremedim, feryat ettim! Şimdi görüyorum! Çarıklarım paramparça oldu ama hâlâ yürüyorum..."

languages.text: {n}Der Mann verzieht sein Gesicht zu einer fanatischen Grimasse.{/n} "Gebete ... keine Worte! Gebete ... Taten der Rrrrechtschaffenen! Gottimperator ... Ich ... habe Deinen Plan nicht erkannt, also klagte ich. Jetzt sehe ich klar! Meine Sandalen sind zerschunden, aber ich gehe noch ..."
languages.original_text: {n}The man's face twists into a semblance of zealous frenzy.{/n} "Prayer... not words! Prayer... deeds of the rrrighteous! God-Emperor... I... f-failed to see Your plan, so I wailed! Now I behold! My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk..."
